properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord I knew a time like this Would someday come my way When in disbelief, I've watched my whole life change I'd thought I have the words to tell you how I feel But the only thing my heart is telling me to say Is Lord, stay close to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As I journey through the darkness of this great unknown Lord stay close to me Though I've placed my faith in You I feel so all alone My heart trembles like a child As I walk each scary mile And the only prayer my lips can find to speak Is Lord, stay close to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I guess that I could ask you for some miracle To even take away this trial that I face But Lord I know that You alone know what I need So will You hold me tight As I journey through this place And Lord stay close to me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh Lord when I'm so scared Please be there oh God So I can rest in this promise The promise that you are Lord I know that I can make it through If all I have is you And Lord stay close to me
